title: Doctor orphan-check for ADRs
goal: mini doctor flags decision files in .mini/decisions/ whose phase no longer exists in the state, as a new 'Decisions' check mirroring the existing stale-run-reports check (findStaleDecisions helper + handle subphase ids like phase-1.5.md); covered by tests. The undo half of the backlog item (snapshot/restore the decision file) is deliberately deferred to a separate phase.

steps.title: findStaleDecisions helper in doctor
steps.detail: pure helper mirroring findStaleRunReports: from a .mini/decisions/ listing pick phase-<id>.md files (incl. dotted subphase ids) with no matching phase in the state; returns them sorted. Unit-tested.

steps.title: Gather stale decisions in doctor()
steps.detail: doctor() lists .mini/decisions/ (a listDecisionDir helper, [] when missing, added to the existing Promise.all) and computes staleDecisions via findStaleDecisions only for an existing project.

steps.title: Decisions check in buildDiagnostics
steps.detail: add staleDecisions:string[] to DoctorInput; emit a Decisions check (ok = no stale decisions; warn = N stale (names) + delete hint), placed right after the Run reports check.

steps.title: Tests for the Decisions check
steps.detail: buildDiagnostics test (ok + warn cases) and a findStaleDecisions unit test (matching phase kept, missing phase flagged, subphase + non-matching files handled).

steps.title: Update doctor docs
steps.detail: mention the Decisions orphan-check in docs/interactive/doctor.md + docs/non-interactive/doctor.md (and README if it lists the doctor checks).
